prompt: An authentic childs crayon and marker doodle on a sheet of slightly crumpled white paper, photographed from above. Drawing depicts: a cheerful family of three (mom in pink dress, dad in blue, child in red) holding hands in front of a triangular-roof house, a bright yellow sun with rays in the upper-left corner, fluffy white clouds, two simple flowers, and a smiling cat. Wobbly imperfect lines, vibrant uneven crayon textures, mixed crayon and felt-tip marker. The paper has slight wrinkles and pencil shadows. No text, no signature.
